name: accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor payments/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual formatting causes delays in report delivery. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual formatting of compliance reports from vendor payment records is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual formatting of compliance reports from vendor payment records is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual formatting causes delays in report delivery. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
